retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the kfree_skb operations are unconditional per queued skb and always succeed.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to flush and discard pending skbs from a queue and release the cork; the kfree_skb calls (put) are part of cleanup, not a focused refcount wrapper. The function does not expose any reference-counted object to the caller.
